title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 16 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 16 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 16 2026
summary:
Main
The iron ore market saw narrow fluctuations today, with the DCE main contract I2609 eventually closing at 759.5 RMB/ton,unchanged from the previous day. Spot prices at Qingdao Port fell by 2-5 RMB/ton compared to the previous trading day. Traders sold goods in line with market conditions, while steel mills showed improved purchasing willingness, and market trading activity was better than yesterday.
